about.title: About Harvics
about.subtitle: Excellence in Premium Consumer Goods Since 2019
about.story1: Founded in 2019, Harvics has grown from a visionary idea into a global leader in premium consumer goods. Our journey is defined by a relentless pursuit of quality and a commitment to innovation.
about.story2: We operate across 40+ countries, delivering products that enrich lives and set new standards in the industry. From our humble beginnings to our global presence, our values remain unchanged.

hero.title: Corporate Social Responsibility
hero.description: At Harvics, we are committed to making a positive impact on the world. Our CSR initiatives focus on sustainability, community empowerment, and ethical business practices.

initiatives.title: Our Key Initiatives
initiatives.description: We focus on four main pillars to drive sustainable change and create shared value for all stakeholders.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: Reducing our environmental footprint through renewable energy and waste reduction.

community.title: Community Support
community.description: Empowering local communities through education, healthcare, and economic development.

education.title: Education
education.description: Providing access to quality education and scholarships for underprivileged students.

health.title: Health & Wellness
health.description: Improving access to healthcare and nutrition in underserved regions.

products.a1: We offer a wide range of premium food products including confectionery, beverages, snacks, pasta, bakery items, and frozen foods across multiple categories.
products.q2: Where can I buy Harvics products?
products.a2: Our products are available in retail stores across 40+ countries. Use our store locator or contact page to find a retailer near you.
products.a3: Yes, we offer bulk order discounts for businesses and retailers. Visit our Bulk Order Discounts page for more information.

ordersShipping.a1: We offer various shipping options including standard, express, and international shipping. Free shipping is available on orders over $50.
ordersShipping.a2: Delivery times vary by location. Standard delivery typically takes 5-7 business days, while express delivery takes 2-3 business days.
ordersShipping.a3: Yes, you can track your order using the tracking number provided in your order confirmation email.

accountPayments.q1: How do I create an account?
accountPayments.a1: Click on "Sign In" in the header and select "Create Account" to register for a new account.
accountPayments.q2: What payment methods do you accept?
accountPayments.a2: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for B2B orders.
accountPayments.a3: Yes, we use industry-standard encryption to protect your payment information.

returnsRefunds.a1: We offer a 30-day return policy for unopened products in original packaging. Please contact our customer service for return authorization.
returnsRefunds.q2: How do I request a refund?
returnsRefunds.a2: Contact our customer service team with your order number and reason for return. We will process your refund within 5-7 business days.

contactCta.title: Still Have Questions?
contactCta.subtitle: Our customer service team is here to help

hero.title: Our Journey
hero.subtitle: From a Dubai startup to a global enterprise spanning 42+ countries, 10 industry verticals, and 38 languages.

cta.title: Be Part of the Next Chapter
cta.subtitle: Join us as we scale to 60+ countries and build the future of AI-driven global commerce.

2019.title: Founded in Dubai
2019.description: Harvics Global Ventures established in the UAE with a vision to become a world-class FMCG and multi-vertical trading conglomerate. First operations launched across textiles and consumer goods.

2020.title: First International Expansion
2020.description: Expanded to 10 countries across Europe, Middle East, and South Asia despite global pandemic challenges. Launched digital supply chain operations and remote distribution partnerships.

2021.title: Multi-Vertical Expansion
2021.description: Launched 5 new industry verticals: Commodities, Industrial Equipment, Minerals & Mining, Oil & Gas, and Real Estate. Total product catalog exceeded 500 SKUs across all verticals.

2022.title: Digital Transformation
2022.description: Built the first version of Harvics OS — the AI-powered enterprise platform. Launched distributor portals, e-commerce capabilities, and real-time GPS fleet tracking across all markets.

2023.title: Sustainability & Scale
2023.description: Committed to carbon-neutral operations. Reached 30+ countries. Launched HPay (digital payments platform), trade finance solutions, and AI-driven demand forecasting across all verticals.

2024.title: Global Enterprise
2024.description: Surpassed 42+ countries milestone. Deployed AI engine with 6 ML models for strategy, demand, pricing, coverage, and SKU optimization. Launched multi-language platform supporting 38 languages.

2025.title: AI-First Operating System
2025.description: Harvics OS v2 launched — unified enterprise operating system with real-time intelligence, Socket.io live feeds, Alpha Engine for market attack plans, and complete 8-level geographic hierarchy.

2026.title: The Vision Ahead
2026.description: Scaling to 60+ countries. Building the world's first AI-operated FMCG enterprise where every function — procurement, logistics, finance, CRM — runs on predictive intelligence with human approval gates.
